author: Flippy
msg:
The error means that there was an issue validating the integrity of the device. This could be caused by anything that modifies system-level services.

Team's suggestion is a factory reset and updating to the latest android version possible for your device. 

- Form via WEB: https://unitynodes.io/bug-report/
- Telegram BOT: https://t.me/UnityBugReportBot
- Email: support@unitynodes.io
